blended.narrative: Hogadon is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Strong winds with gusts to 43 mph may cause lift holds. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: overcast, highs of 46°F, gusts to 43 mph.
Tomorrow: overcast, highs of 48°F, winds around 24 mph.
Saturday: overcast, highs of 48°F, winds around 23 mph.
Sunday: 8" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 3" over the past week. Current depth: 20".
